descriptionShort: Jim Hughson introduces the 1987 Richmond Sockeyes HOF induction ceremony on July 13, 2025.
descriptionLong: Part one of Jim Hughson's opening remarks at the BC Hockey Hall of Fame induction ceremony honoring the 1987 Richmond Sockeyes Centennial Cup championship team. Hughson sets the stage for the evening's celebration and tribute to this historic junior-A squad.
